home.subtitle: Learn Esperanto, connect with the world.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: The Galatasaray University Esperanto Club was founded to promote and spread Esperanto, the international language of communication.
about.p2: Esperanto was created by Ludwik Lazarz Zamenhof in 1887 as an easy-to-learn, neutral international language. Through our club, you can learn Esperanto, attend our events, and connect with Esperantists around the world.

contact.title: Contact
contact.addressValue: Galatasaray University, Çırağan Cad. No:36, Beşiktaş, Istanbul
